name: l2_powered_hover_surface_impingement
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceImpingement couples hover wake momentum flux to ground and ceiling impingement targets.
note: Primary audit surface for powered hover surface impingement targets.

name: l2_powered_hover_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverWakeFootprint supplies far-wake area momentum flux and downwash footprint context.
note: Wake footprint input.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies per-rotor disk radius and hover source terms.
note: Rotor disk geometry input.

name: surface_nearfield_calibration
value: SurfaceNearfieldCalibration supplies JIRS ground and ceiling exponential curve-fit multipliers.
note: Surface-effect curve input.

name: jirs2024_surface_effect
value: JIRS 2024 ground ceiling and wall effect packet supplies raw surface-effect evidence and curve-fit coefficients.
note: Experimental reference for surface-effect multipliers.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for future powered hover wake impingement validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live validation.
